name: command-palette
description: A ⌘K command palette: a modal combobox over a list of commands, filtered as you type. Full ARIA combobox-in-dialog pattern, keyboard navigation, focus restoration and a result-count announcement.

notes: role=dialog with aria-modal, containing a role=combobox input wired to a role=listbox
The highlighted command is tracked via aria-activedescendant — focus stays in the input
⌘K toggles, ↓/↑ move, Enter runs, Esc closes; Tab is kept inside the palette
Focus is restored to the previously focused element when the palette closes
The result count is announced via a polite live region

intents: a Cmd+K / Ctrl+K command palette to navigate or run actions quickly
a searchable command menu like Slack or VSCode
a quick launcher modal filtered as you type
examples: <CommandPalette commands={[{ id: 'home', label: 'Go home', onSelect: () => router.push('/') }]} />
